scenario.name: User rejects in-session approval; selector routes to MR path

final_local.change_request: Rotate the JWT signing key and shorten the access-token TTL from 1h to 15m.
final_local.intent_analysis:
Ask: security/refactor — rotate JWT signing key and shorten access-token TTL 1h→15m.
Systems/files: auth service (token issue + verify), JWKS endpoint, client refresh logic.
Constraints: old keys must still verify until expiry; refresh flow must handle the shorter TTL without rate-limiting clients; rotation runbook needs codeowner sign-off.
Codeowners: no CODEOWNERS file in repo — defaults to repo owner.
Acceptance: new keys signed in JWKS; old keys remain verifiable for the grace window; client refresh works under shorter TTL; no spike in 401 rate post-deploy.
